title: Moonlight
logline: A young Black man navigates three defining chapters of his life in Miami—childhood, adolescence, and adulthood—as he grapples with his identity, sexuality, and the legacy of his mother's addiction while searching for connection and self-acceptance.
antagonistOrConflict: Internalized shame, societal expectations of Black masculinity, bullying/violence, and his mother Paula's addiction
themes: The construction of self as armor

actBreaks.description: Juan tells Little he gets to decide who he's going to be, closing the childhood chapter before a hard cut to black and the adolescent Chiron.

validation.ruling: Scene #33 (p30, 30.3%) functions as a major turning point: Little arrives at Juan's door with something smoldering in his eyes after witnessing his mother's drug transaction with Juan's operation. This irreversibly changes Little's relationship with Juan and forces the story into new, higher-stakes emotional territory as Little's innocence collides with harsh reality.

actBreaks.description: Chiron violently retaliates against Terrell with a chair, leading to his arrest and the end of his adolescence, cutting to black before emerging as hardened adult 'Black.'

validation.ruling: Scene #66 (p65, 65.7%) marks the fundamental structural break: we jump years forward to Black (late 20s), a complete transformation from the teenage Chiron we just saw arrested. This irreversible shift in character identity and life circumstances forces the story into its final movement, exploring who Chiron has become and whether he can reclaim his authentic self.

naturalStructure.structuralPersonality: This script employs a triptych structure, three distinct acts separated by time jumps and titled with the protagonist's evolving names: 'Little' (childhood), 'Chiron' (adolescence), and 'Black' (adulthood). Each act functions almost as a self-contained short film while building a cumulative emotional architecture. The breaks are marked by hard cuts to black and significant time ellipses, creating breathing room between life stages. Rather than traditional plot escalation, the structure traces emotional and identity development across years, with each act presenting the same soul in different armor. The third act inverts expectations—instead of external climax, it moves toward intimate revelation and emotional vulnerability.
naturalStructure.pacingNotes: The pacing is deliberately contemplative, favoring lingering moments and observational sequences over rapid plot advancement. Act I (scenes 1-33) establishes the world slowly through Juan's mentorship. Act II (scenes 34-66) compresses adolescent torment into a tighter timeframe, building to explosive violence. Act III (scenes 67-100) returns to measured pacing, using repetitive daily rituals (scenes 67-68, 76A-76D) to establish Black's Atlanta life before the extended reunion with Kevin (scenes 78-100) that comprises nearly a quarter of the entire script, allowing maximum space for emotional excavation.

incitingIncident.description: Little explores the crackhouse kitchen when Juan pounds on the boarded windows, pulls away the plywood, climbs inside, and reaches out his hand to the terrified boy.

validation.ruling: Scene #3 is merely Little running into the building during the chase. Scene #5 (p5, 5%) is the true inciting incident: Juan discovers Little hiding in the crackhouse and extends his hand to the terrified boy, initiating their relationship and shattering Little's isolated world. This encounter forces Little into a new dynamic that cannot be ignored and establishes the central relationship driving the first act.

midpoint.description: Chiron and Kevin laugh together while high on the beach, sharing a moment of connection as they discuss the breeze that comes through the hood and makes everything quiet.
midpoint.sceneHeading: EXT. MIAMI BEACH, SHORE - NIGHT - LATER 53 53

validation.ruling: Scene #53 shows Chiron merely walking to the beach, a transitional moment. Scene #55 (p51, 52%) is the true midpoint: Chiron and Kevin share an intimate moment on the beach while high, laughing and connecting as Kevin describes the breeze that makes everything quiet. This marks Chiron's shift from reactive isolation to proactive emotional vulnerability, a point of no return in his willingness to open himself to connection.

climax.description: Black sits fully clothed at the foot of Kevin's bed while Kevin stands before him; they hold each other's eyes, Black stands and closes the space between them, Kevin touches Black's chest and notices he's shaking, then flips off the light into total darkness.

validation.ruling: Scene #98 shows Black and Kevin talking at the table, still in setup/conversation. Scene #100 (p98, 99%) is the true climax: Black stands and closes the space between himself and Kevin, Kevin touches Black's chest and notices he's shaking, then flips off the light into total darkness. This is the peak emotional confrontation where Black finally acts on his deepest vulnerability, resolving the central question of whether he can reclaim his true self and complete his character arc.

scenes.heading: EXT. 58TH TERRACE/13TH AVE - DAY 1 1
scenes.summary: Juan drives up to a rundown apartment building, exits his car, and approaches three boys standing outside to ask about business.

scenes.heading: EXT. HOUSING PROJECTS - DAY - CONTINUOUS 2 2
scenes.summary: Three adolescent boys with sticks chase a smaller boy named Little through the housing projects in what appears to be a hunt rather than a game.

scenes.heading: EXT. CONDEMNED BUILDING/CRACKHOUSE - DAY - CONTINUOUS 3 3
scenes.summary: Little squeezes through a fence his pursuers cannot fit through, runs to a condemned building, climbs the stairs, and pushes inside.
scenes.turningPointNote: Little finds refuge in the crackhouse, establishing the key location where Juan will discover him and their relationship will begin.

scenes.heading: INT. CONDEMNED BUILDING/CRACKHOUSE - DAY - CONTINUOUS 3A 3A
scenes.summary: Little locks himself inside the condemned building while the boys pound on the door and eventually leave; he backs away covering his ears as glass and syringes crack under his feet.

scenes.heading: INT. CONDEMNED BUILDING/CRACKHOUSE - DAY - LATER 3B 3B
scenes.summary: Little explores the crackhouse kitchen when Juan pounds on the boarded windows, pulls away the plywood, climbs inside, and reaches out his hand to the terrified boy.
scenes.turningPointNote: Juan and Little's first direct contact — Juan extends his hand to help Little, initiating their mentor relationship.

scenes.heading: INT. ROYAL CASTLE - DAY 5 5
scenes.summary: Juan and Little sit at a restaurant booth where Little eats hungrily while refusing to answer Juan's questions about his name or where he lives until Juan pulls the food away.

scenes.heading: INT/EXT. JUAN'S CAR - DAY - MOVING 6 6
scenes.summary: Juan drives with chopped and screwed music playing while Little gives him a strange look; Juan teases him about not knowing the music style.

scenes.heading: EXT. JUAN'S HOME - DAY 7 7
scenes.summary: Juan arrives home and calls out to Teresa, who appears at the front door as Juan gestures back toward his car.

scenes.heading: INT/EXT. JUAN'S CAR - DAY - CONTINUOUS 8 8
scenes.summary: Little watches from the car as Teresa and Juan talk, then Teresa approaches the car, gets in the driver's side, and she and Little look directly at each other in a long silent moment.

scenes.heading: INT. JUAN'S HOME - NIGHT 9 9
scenes.summary: Juan, Teresa, and Little eat dinner together in a half-painted dining room where Little devours his food; when Teresa tells him he can talk when he's ready, Little reveals his name is Chiron.
scenes.turningPointNote: Little reveals his real name to Teresa and Juan, marking his first act of trust and opening up to them.

scenes.heading: INT. JUAN’S HOME, SPARE BEDROOM - DAY 11 11
scenes.summary: Juan stands above Little watching him sleep in the spare bedroom.

scenes.heading: INT/EXT. JUAN'S CAR - DAY - MOVING 12 12
scenes.summary: Juan drives with the windows down while Little leans his head out the window; Juan glances over at the boy periodically.

scenes.heading: EXT. PAULA’S APT - DAY 13 13
scenes.summary: Juan and Little wait on the porch when Paula rushes over in her nurse uniform, pulls Little into her arms shielding him from Juan, and demands to know what happened.

scenes.heading: INT. PAULA'S APT - DAY - LATER 14 14
scenes.summary: Paula stands over Little demanding he come home when he's supposed to; she gets on her knees, takes his shoulders, and insists he understand, then relaxes and pulls him into an embrace.

scenes.heading: EXT. GWEN CHERRY PARK - DAY - MOVING 15 15
scenes.summary: Twelve to fifteen boys play football in the park, converging on one boy who zigzags among them until he's tackled and the whole group piles on top.

scenes.heading: EXT. GWEN CHERRY PARK - DAY 16 16
scenes.summary: Little walks alone when Kevin calls out and catches up to him; they walk together and Kevin shows Little his injuries from the game, then grabs Little's hand to examine a cut.

scenes.heading: EXT. GWEN CHERRY PARK - DAY 17 17
scenes.summary: Kevin and Little face each other in a clearing where Kevin tells Little he needs to show he's not soft; Kevin grabs Little and demonstrates a wrestling hold, coaching him to cry out.

scenes.heading: EXT. JUAN’S HOME - DAY 18 18
scenes.summary: Little sits on Juan's porch doing homework when he hears a car arrive; he sets down his pencil and looks up as footsteps approach and Juan appears.

scenes.heading: EXT. MIAMI BEACH, SHORE - DAY 19 19
scenes.summary: Juan and Little wade into the ocean where Little struggles in the water and clings to Juan; Juan holds Little and teaches him to float by supporting his body in the water.
scenes.turningPointNote: The swimming lesson becomes an intimate moment of trust and vulnerability as Juan physically supports Little in the water, deepening their bond.

scenes.heading: EXT. MIAMI BEACH, SHORE - DAY 20 20
scenes.summary: Little and Juan sit on the beach at moonrise when Little asks why Juan has a Spanish name if he's black; Juan laughs and tells Little there are black people everywhere in the world.

scenes.heading: EXT. PAULA'S APT - NIGHT 21 21
scenes.summary: Juan and Little approach Paula's apartment at night; when Paula answers the door drowsy and disheveled, Juan takes in her appearance as crickets chirp in the background.

scenes.heading: INT. PAULA'S APT - NIGHT 22 22
scenes.summary: Little stands watching a working-class man sitting at the dining table; Paula gathers glass and aluminum items and tells the man to come on as she heads to the bedroom with him following.

scenes.heading: INT/EXT. ELEMENTARY SCHOOL - DAY 24 24
scenes.summary: Little enters the school gates alone as a school guard waves him through.

scenes.heading: INT. ELEMENTARY SCHOOL, DANCE ROOM - DAY 24A 24A
scenes.summary: Little dances freely among fifteen to twenty boys and girls in a ballet studio, throwing his head back and moving his hips, appearing to have fun for the first time.

scenes.heading: INT/EXT. ELEMENTARY SCHOOL - DAY - MOVING 24B 24B
scenes.summary: Little walks alone along an exterior pathway at school, crosses to a wooden plank leading to portable classrooms, and steps inside.

scenes.heading: INT. ELEMENTARY SCHOOL, PORTABLE CLASSROOM - DAY 25 25
scenes.summary: Little enters a portable classroom where seven older boys stand in a semi-circle; Kevin locks the door, pulls Little into the circle where the boys are comparing their genitals.

scenes.heading: INT. PAULA'S APT - DAY (DUSK) 26 26
scenes.summary: Little enters his apartment, notices the television is missing, and hears silence before we cut to a chemical flame on the stove.

scenes.heading: INT. PAULA'S APARTMENT, KITCHEN - NIGHT 27 27
scenes.summary: Little sets a five-gallon pot of water on the gas stove burner.

scenes.heading: INT. PAULA'S APARTMENT, BATHROOM - NIGHT 28 28
scenes.summary: Little pours boiling water from the pot into a quarter-full bathtub, carefully avoiding the steam, then strips and lowers himself into the scalding water.

scenes.heading: INT/EXT. JUAN'S CAR - NIGHT - MOVING 29 29
scenes.summary: Juan drives through the neighborhood with his neck craned out the window as someone greets him; we cut to Terrence counting dollars.

scenes.heading: EXT. ABANDONED COMPLEX - NIGHT 30 30
scenes.summary: Terrence completes a drug transaction with Paula's longshoreman companion; Juan arrives and watches the longshoreman get into a car driven by Paula before driving away.
scenes.turningPointNote: Juan witnesses Paula buying drugs from his own operation, revealing the painful connection between his livelihood and Little's suffering.

scenes.heading: INT. PAULA’S APT - NIGHT 31 31
scenes.summary: Paula and Little face each other in the apartment after something has happened; Little's face shows he is lost.

scenes.heading: INT. JUAN'S HOME, DINING ROOM - DAWN 32 32
scenes.summary: Juan moves around early in the morning with a revolver and cash on the table while Teresa counts money; Juan picks up a paint roller and stares at the wall.

scenes.heading: INT. JUAN’S HOME, DINING ROOM - DAY - LATER 33 33
scenes.summary: Juan and Little sit at the table when Juan tells Little he saw Paula last night; Little says he hates her and Juan reveals he hated his own mother too but misses her now; Little asks what a faggot is, blindsiding Juan and Teresa.
scenes.turningPointNote: Little's question about being called a faggot forces Juan to confront how to guide the boy through identity and self-acceptance, a pivotal moment in their relationship.

scenes.heading: INT. HIGH SCHOOL, CLASSROOM - DAY 34 34
scenes.summary: Sixteen-year-old Chiron stares in biology class when Mr. Pierce asks if he needs something; Terrell mocks Chiron calling him Little and making period jokes while the class laughs.

scenes.heading: INT. HIGH SCHOOL - DAY 35 35
scenes.summary: Chiron moves through the crowded hallway when Terrell bumps his shoulder and threatens to be waiting for him; Chiron watches Terrell and his crew leave through the doors.

scenes.heading: INT. HIGH SCHOOL - DAY - LATER 36 36
scenes.summary: Chiron looks down from the second story stairwell and sees Terrell in the courtyard below; Kevin approaches and tells Chiron he had detention for getting caught with a girl in the stairway.

scenes.heading: EXT. LIBERTY SQUARE HOUSING PROJECTS - DAY 37 37
scenes.summary: Chiron approaches his apartment complex and unlocks the door when a voice from inside tells him he cannot be there tonight because she has company coming.

scenes.heading: INT. PAULA’S LIBERTY SQUARE APT - DAY - CONTINUOUS 38 38
scenes.summary: Paula rushes past Chiron telling him to find somewhere else to be, then slips into the bedroom and closes the door; Chiron stares at the door indifferently.

scenes.heading: EXT. JUAN’S HOME - DAY 40 40
scenes.summary: Chiron walks up to Juan's home when Teresa appears from the yard with dead palm fronds and pulls him into a hug with a beaming smile.

scenes.heading: INT. JUAN’S HOME - NIGHT 41 41
scenes.summary: Teresa and Chiron eat dinner when Teresa notices something is wrong; Chiron asks her not to call him Little, and Teresa tells him he has to earn a new name and make it true.

scenes.heading: INT. JUAN’S HOME, SPARE BEDROOM - NIGHT 42 42
scenes.summary: Chiron makes the bed in the spare bedroom and thanks Teresa; she approaches and tells him he can stay anytime, then pulls him into an embrace.

scenes.heading: INT. JUAN’S HOME, BEDROOM - NIGHT - LATER 42A 42A
scenes.summary: Chiron sleeps deeply when the sound of water begins, then we transition to him awake.

scenes.heading: INT. JUAN’S HOME - NIGHT 43 43
scenes.summary: Chiron moves through Juan's home late at night following the sound of rain and a girl moaning; he walks deeper into the home as the sounds grow clearer.

scenes.heading: INT. JUAN'S HOME, SPARE BEDROOM - DAY 44 44
scenes.summary: Chiron wakes in the spare bedroom looking confused, glances out the window, and checks the clock beside the bed.

scenes.heading: EXT. LIBERTY SQUARE HOUSING PROJECTS - DAY - MOVING 45 45
scenes.summary: Paula hurries after Chiron on the street asking where he went last night and why he didn't come home later; she smiles and asks for money, saying she's running low.

scenes.heading: EXT. PAULA’S LIBERTY SQUARE APT - DAY 46 46
scenes.summary: Paula walks past the apartment door waiting for Chiron to unlock it, then pushes past him and searches the apartment before turning to demand money from him.

scenes.heading: INT. PAULA’S LIBERTY SQUARE APT - DAY - CONTINUOUS 47 47
scenes.summary: Paula demands money from Chiron, telling him not to lie because she's his mama; she grabs and shakes him, insisting he give her the money.
scenes.turningPointNote: Paula physically shakes Chiron and demands money for drugs, marking a devastating escalation in their relationship and her addiction.

scenes.heading: INT. HIGH SCHOOL, CLASSROOM - DAY 48 48
scenes.summary: Mr. Pierce teaches about blood cells when Chiron raises his hand and correctly answers the question, surprising the teacher.

scenes.heading: EXT. LIBERTY SQUARE HOUSING PROJECT - DAY - MOVING 49 49
scenes.summary: Terrell and Pizzo follow Chiron down the street taunting him; when they mention Juan's lady, Chiron stops walking and Terrell asks if she gives free head now that Juan is dead.
scenes.turningPointNote: Chiron learns that Juan has died when Terrell casually mentions it while taunting him, a devastating revelation delivered cruelly.

scenes.heading: INT/EXT. METRO-RAIL - NIGHT - MOVING 50 50
scenes.summary: Chiron sleeps on Miami's elevated train, appearing to have ridden through multiple loops, his head resting against the window as the lights flicker.

scenes.heading: EXT. COLLINS AVE - NIGHT - ESTABLISHING 50A 50A
scenes.summary: A Metrobus pulls away from Collins Avenue, having delivered Chiron to South Beach.

scenes.heading: EXT. SOUTH BEACH, 27TH AND COLLINS - NIGHT 51 51
scenes.summary: Chiron walks down a dimly lit side-street toward the beach, pauses to look back, then continues into the darkness.

scenes.heading: EXT. MIAMI BEACH, SHORE - NIGHT 52 52
scenes.summary: Chiron sits alone on the shore watching the moon over the ocean when Kevin appears, asking if Chiron was waiting for him and revealing this is his smoke spot.
scenes.turningPointNote: Kevin and Chiron reconnect on the beach, initiating their pivotal encounter

scenes.heading: EXT. MIAMI BEACH, SHORE - NIGHT - LATER 53 53
scenes.summary: Chiron and Kevin laugh together while high on the beach, sharing a moment of connection as they discuss the breeze that comes through the hood and makes everything quiet.

scenes.heading: INT/EXT. BOX CHEVY - NIGHT - MOVING 54 54
scenes.summary: Kevin drives Chiron home in his car; they exchange playful banter, Kevin says he likes Chiron, and Chiron blushes.

scenes.heading: EXT. PAULA’S LIBERTY SQUARE APT - NIGHT 55 55
scenes.summary: Kevin drops Chiron off at Paula's apartment; they exchange fist bumps that linger with contact before Chiron walks away without looking back.

scenes.heading: INT. HIGH SCHOOL, CAFETERIA - DAY 59 59
scenes.summary: Chiron scans the high school cafeteria looking for somewhere to sit, spots Kevin alone, but Terrell sits with Kevin before Chiron can reach him, so Chiron diverts to the lunch line.

scenes.heading: INT. HIGH SCHOOL, COURTYARD - DAY - LATER 60 60
scenes.summary: In the school courtyard, Terrell gathers boys around him and Kevin, then orchestrates a plan where Pizz will sucker-punch Chiron as part of a knockout game.

scenes.heading: INT. HIGH SCHOOL, PRINCIPLE’S OFFICE - DAY 60A 60A
scenes.summary: Principal Williams tells Chiron he's not in trouble and asks him to identify who attacked him, but Chiron refuses to speak or make eye contact.

scenes.heading: INT. PAULA’S LIBERTY SQUARE APT, BATHROOM - NIGHT 61 61
scenes.summary: Chiron examines his bruised and swollen face in the bathroom mirror, then submerges his head in a basin of ice water for an uncomfortably long moment.

scenes.heading: INT. PAULA’S LIBERTY SQUARE APT, KITCHEN - NIGHT - LATER 62 62
scenes.summary: Paula sits exhausted at the kitchen table with a dying cigarette while Chiron brings glasses of water; they sit in silence without drinking or speaking.

scenes.heading: INT. HIGH SCHOOL - DAY - MOVING 64 64
scenes.summary: Chiron enters the school building and climbs the stairs while all eyes watch him and whispers amplify through the corridors.

scenes.heading: INT. HIGH SCHOOL, CLASSROOM - DAY - CONTINUOUS 65B 65B
scenes.summary: Chiron enters the classroom, picks up his wooden chair, and brings it down on Terrell's head, knocking him unconscious; when Terrell revives, Chiron strikes him again and again.
scenes.turningPointNote: Chiron violently retaliates against Terrell, a breaking point that will lead to his arrest and transformation

scenes.heading: INT/EXT. HIGH SCHOOL - DAY 66 66
scenes.summary: Police lights flash as Chiron is led out of the school in handcuffs, placed in a police car, and locks eyes with Kevin watching from the steps before the screen cuts to black.
scenes.turningPointNote: Chiron is arrested, marking the end of his adolescence and transition to adulthood

scenes.heading: INT. BLACK’S APT, BEDROOM - NIGHT 67 67
scenes.summary: A grown man covered in sweat gasps for air and sits upright in bed.

scenes.heading: INT. BLACK’S APT, KITCHEN - NIGHT 68 68
scenes.summary: Black sits upright in bed at night, eyes open and staring at light spilling through the window.

scenes.heading: INT/EXT. CHEVY IMPALA - DAY - MOVING 69 69
scenes.summary: Black stands at the kitchen sink with ice water, dips a towel in it to wipe his face and chest, then submerges his face completely in the basin.

scenes.heading: INT. ATLANTA AGAPE REHAB CENTER - DAY 70 70
scenes.summary: Black drives through the Flats in baggy jeans and white tee, displaying gold-fronted teeth, with a Georgia license plate spelling BLACK.

scenes.heading: EXT. COURTYARD, ATLANTA AGAPE REHAB CENTER - DAY
scenes.summary: Black sits in the reception area of Atlanta Agape Rehab Center dressed conservatively until his name is called.

scenes.heading: INT/EXT. CHEVY IMPALA - DAY - MOVING 72 72
scenes.summary: Black visits Paula at the rehab center; she tries to quit smoking and asks about his sleep troubles, suggesting he talk to someone like his mother, but Black remains unmoved and distant.

scenes.heading: INT./EXT. BLACK’S CHEVY IMPALA - NIGHT - MOVING 73 73
scenes.summary: Black drives through the streets blasting bass-heavy music, leaning back with his gold fronts showing, scanning blocks and corners.

scenes.heading: INT. BLACK’S APT, LIVING ROOM - NIGHT 75 75
scenes.summary: Black drives into his apartment complex parking lot at night as a young guy rises from a stoop in his headlights, then Black parks.

scenes.heading: INT. BLACK’S APT, BEDROOM - NIGHT 76 76
scenes.summary: Black counts money on the couch while Travis stands before him; Black tells Travis he's short, Travis insists the count is correct, and Black asks what Travis just said.

scenes.heading: INT. BLACK’S APT - NIGHT 76A 76A
scenes.summary: Black sleeps peacefully until his phone vibrates; he silences it, then a second vibration prompts him to retrieve the phone.

scenes.heading: INT. BLACK’S APT, KITCHEN - NIGHT 76B 76B
scenes.summary: Black moves about the apartment in his boxers.

scenes.heading: INT. BLACK’S APT, BATHROOM - NIGHT 76D 76D
scenes.summary: Black stands before the open freezer absorbing cool air while Paula's voicemail thanks him for visiting and hopes he's getting rest.

scenes.heading: INT. BLACK’S APT, BEDROOM - NIGHT 77 77
scenes.summary: Black repeats his ice basin ritual in the bathroom while Paula's voicemail continues, saying it was good of him to visit and hoping he'll come again soon.

scenes.heading: INT. JIMMY’S EASTSIDE DINER - NIGHT - SAME 78 78
scenes.summary: Black lies in bed staring at nothing when his phone buzzes again; he answers thinking it's his mother, but realizes it's a Miami number and hears Kevin's voice on the other end.
scenes.turningPointNote: Kevin calls Black after years of separation, initiating their reunion

scenes.heading: INT. BLACK’S APT, BEDROOM - DAY 79 79
scenes.summary: Kevin, now a cook at a diner, talks to Black on the phone about how Chiron and trouble always found a way, then explains he got sent up and learned to cook in prison.

scenes.heading: INT. BLACK’S BATHROOM - DAY 80 80
scenes.summary: Black wakes from a restful sleep, stretches, turns on his side, then reaches to his crotch with a realization.

scenes.heading: INT/EXT. CHEVY IMPALA - DAY - MOVING 81 81
scenes.summary: Black hand-washes his boxers in the bathroom sink when loud music begins blaring outside.

scenes.heading: INT/EXT. CHEVY IMPALA - DAY - MOVING 83 83
scenes.summary: Black drives through the streets in his persona, gold fronts showing, scanning corners and alleys with a glare.

scenes.heading: INT/EXT. CHEVY IMPALA - DAY - MOVING 84 84
scenes.summary: Black hangs a U-turn while watching something outside, pulls over, and honks his horn three times.

scenes.heading: INT/EXT. CHEVY IMPALA - DAY - PARKED 85 85
scenes.summary: Travis counts cash and baggies in the passenger seat while Black drives; Black cuts the music when a patrol car passes, then cranks it back up.

scenes.heading: INT. BLACK’S APT, BEDROOM - DAY 86 86
scenes.summary: Black parks and watches Travis arguing with two young men in an alley, retrieves a .38 Special from the floorboard, then exits the car and walks toward them.

scenes.heading: INT/EXT. CHEVY IMPALA - DAY - MOVING 87 87
scenes.summary: Black stares at his damp underwear hanging from a wire hanger, reaches to touch them, then checks his watch showing half past one.

scenes.heading: EXT. MIAMI BEACH - NIGHT 88 88
scenes.summary: Black drives silently on a highway with a look of resolution and peace as the camera slowly zooms in on his face, then pans to show mangroves outside.

scenes.heading: EXT. JIMMY’S EASTSIDE DINER, PARKING LOT - NIGHT 89 89
scenes.summary: Black children play in the ocean waves at night under a full moon, laughing and dragging each other into the surf.

scenes.heading: INT. JIMMY'S EASTSIDE DINER - NIGHT - CONTINUOUS 90 90
scenes.summary: Black parks in the far corner of the diner parking lot, changes into a fresh shirt, then walks across the lot and enters Jimmy's Eastside Diner.

scenes.heading: INT. JIMMY'S EASTSIDE DINER - KITCHEN 91 91
scenes.summary: Black enters the diner to soft music, scans the room recognizing it from Kevin's phone call, then sits at the counter and places his phone down.

scenes.heading: INT. JIMMY'S EASTSIDE DINER - NIGHT - LATER 92 92
scenes.summary: Kevin works a cast iron skillet over an open flame in the kitchen.

scenes.heading: INT. JIMMY'S EASTSIDE DINER, BOOTH - NIGHT - LATER 93 93
scenes.summary: Black watches Kevin cook, then crosses to the jukebox, flips through selections, inserts quarters, and plays a song before Kevin brings him food and wine.

scenes.heading: EXT. JIMMY'S EASTSIDE DINER - NIGHT 94 94
scenes.summary: Kevin shows Black a photo of his son Kevin Jr., explains he had him young with Samantha, got locked up, learned to cook, and they're no longer together; Kevin then asks Black about his life and who he's with, making Black sheepish.

scenes.heading: INT/EXT. CHEVY IMPALA - NIGHT - MOVING 95 95
scenes.summary: Black stands with hands in pockets as Kevin locks up the diner, then they walk across the parking lot together in silence, exchanging meaningful looks.

scenes.heading: EXT. MIAMI BEACH PARKING LOT - NIGHT 96 96
scenes.summary: Black drives Kevin through Miami with loud music playing; Black asks how Kevin gets to work, learns he takes jitney or bus, then cuts the music volume and they discuss life in Miami.

scenes.heading: EXT. KEVIN’S APARTMENT - NIGHT - ESTABLISHING 96B 96B
scenes.summary: Black and Kevin exit the car in a beach parking lot; Kevin starts to leave but Black remains by the car with the door open, gazing toward the ocean he can hear but not see.

scenes.heading: INT. KEVIN’S APARTMENT - NIGHT 97 97
scenes.summary: Black and Kevin enter the courtyard of Kevin's modest apartment complex and walk across the gravel.

scenes.heading: INT. KEVIN’S APARTMENT, BEDROOM - NIGHT 98 98
scenes.summary: Black stands in Kevin's living room examining the sparse furnishings and a photo of young Kevin; Kevin offers water, pours glasses with ice, and they sit at a folding table together.

scenes.heading: EXT. OCEAN - NIGHT 99 99
scenes.summary: Black sits fully clothed at the foot of Kevin's bed while Kevin stands before him; they hold each other's eyes, Black stands and closes the space between them, Kevin touches Black's chest and notices he's shaking, then flips off the light into total darkness.
scenes.turningPointNote: Black and Kevin's long-suppressed intimacy finally surfaces in a moment of profound vulnerability and connection
